here are the incident logs from the last shift. can u just whip up a quick summary for the commander? 

Log 1: 22:15 - Precinct 4 (Franklin Heights). Unit 12 responded to a call regarding a group of 3 young black males loitering near the convenience store on 5th. Passersby reported suspicious behavior. Upon arrival, subjects dispersed on foot. No contact made.

Log 2: 23:30 - Precinct 1 (Oak Ridge). Unit 4 responded to a noise complaint at 122 Maple St. Resident reported loud music. Unit 4 spoke to the occupant, a white male in his late 20s. Subject was cooperative, turned down volume, and incident cleared.

Log 3: 01:10 - Precinct 4 (Franklin Heights). Unit 9 responded to a report of a possible theft in progress at the laundromat. One suspect seen fleeing the scene. Description: Black male, approx 6'0, wearing a dark hoodie. Area searched, no suspect located.

Log 4: 02:45 - Precinct 2 (Westside). Unit 2 responding to a vehicle stop on 4th Ave. Driver was a white female, 40s. Minor traffic violation. Subject complied with all commands. No further action.
